text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer. I wanted to look cool for
everyone, but I majorly failed...
choice_data_list: I'm sure you'll do great next time!
There's no point in being bummed out!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Trainer. I wanted to look cool for
everyone, but I majorly failed...
choice_data_list: I'm sure you'll do great next time!
There's no point in being bummed out!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm going to run home at Mach five and get
to training!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'll show everyone how great I can
really be! Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. Moping about it won't make me
any faster.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I have to learn from Tata. Sometimes she
breaks down, but she starts right back up after
some maintenance!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm done with my repairs! Now I've just got
to put some gas in my tank and put the pedal to
the metal!
